title: 2024730Wet 87W332
summary:
Main
· VLCC Market Sentiment Rebounds but Excitement Might Be Short Lived as Volumes Remain Subdued - The second half of July proved to be a sharp contrast to the earlier month's weakness, with the final week bringing improved market sentiment for the VLCC Middle East Gulf to China route and a firmer momentum in the Atlantic market. Initially, VLCC activity in the Arabian Gulf appeared sluggish. However, a healthier tonnage list bolstered market sentiment despite the initial lack of activity.
